title: calamagrostis elatior
intro: Calamagrostis elatior, also known as tall meadow-grass, is a perennial grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Calamagrostis elatior can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture to utilize its herbal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
